name: Beef Tacos with Mexican Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 can pinto beans or green peas, drained and pureed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the ground beef and onions over medium heat until no longer pink. Drain excess fat.
2. Transfer the browned beef and onions to a slow cooker.
3. Stir in chili powder, dried oregano, paprika, salt, taco sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and pureed beans.
4. Cover and cook on low setting for 8-10 hours, or until the beef is tender.
5. Taste the mixture and adjust seasoning if needed.
6. Serve the beef filling in warm taco shells.
